# Echoo

> Echoo (echoo.gr) is a calm, anonymous chat web app from Greece. It matches you with a stranger for a one-on-one conversation — text first, with voice that unlocks gradually. No profiles to browse, no followers, no feed. Built for genuine, low-pressure human connection.

## What Echoo is

- Anonymous: random nickname, your email is never shown to others
- Temporary: rooms are private and ephemeral, nothing is permanently public
- Calm by design: no gamification, no vanity metrics, no endless scrolling
- Greek-made, available in Greek and English

## Key features

- Anonymous one-on-one matched conversations
- Text chat with progressively unlocking voice (WebRTC)
- Broken Telephone: leave a 15-second anonymous voice message for the next person waiting alone
- Interest-based matchmaking
- Push notifications for matches and weekly events
- Guest accounts that can upgrade to registered while keeping their history
- Sunday Nights: a weekly event where more people are online, 21:00–00:00

## Links

- App: https://echoo.gr
- Privacy: https://echoo.gr/privacy
- Terms: https://echoo.gr/terms
- Community Guidelines: https://echoo.gr/community-guidelines
- Contact: hello@echoo.gr
